title: DNA/RNA extraction from fresh-frozen tissue, AllPrep DNA/RNA/miRNA Universal Kit
author: Annika Fendler

steps_raw.instruction: This protocol is for Sample
Transfer tissue in 350 µL, for up to 10 mg of tissue 600 µL, for 10 to 30 mg or stabilised tissue RLT + ß-ME in 2 ml DNA LoBind tube.

Add a 5mm bead to each tube and lyse tissue in TissueLyser for 00:02:00 @ 20 Hz TissueLyser II (Bead Mill, QIAGEN, 85300, https://www.qiagen.com/us/products/human-id-and-forensics/automation/tissuelyser-ii/#orderinginformation )
Spin down for 00:01:00 @ 9000 x g, °C,
Turn tube rack and lyse tissue for 00:02:00 @ 20 Hz
Incubate 00:10:00 @ Room temperature
Spin down for 00:01:00 @ 9000 x g, °C,
Add lysed product to DNA Mini Spin Column
Add 50 µL, for up to 10 mg tissue 80 µL, for 10 to 30 mg or stabilised tissue Proteinase K (not diluted), mix by pipetting
Add 200 µL, for up to 10 mg tissue 350 µL, for 10 to 30 mg or stabilised tissue EtOH abs., mix by inverting, spin down liquid
Spin 00:00:30 @ max x g, °C, , repeat if any liquid remains on column
Transfer column to a new collection tube and store tube at 4 °C until DNA extraction
Transfer flow-through to new 2 ml LoBind tube
Add 400 µL, for up to 10 mg tissue 750 µL, for 10 to 30 mg or stabilised tissue EtOH abs. , mix by pipetting
Add 700 µL to RNeasy spin column and spin for 00:00:30 @ max x g, °C, and discard flow-through
Repeat until all liquid passed through the column
Add 500 µL RPE
Spin 00:00:30 @ max x g, °C, and discard flow-through
Add 80 µL DNase I working solution directly onto the membrane and incubate 00:15:00 at Room temperature
Add 500 µL FRN
Spin 00:00:30 @ max x g, °C, and don't discard flow-through and place column in new collection tube
Add flow-through again to column
Spin 00:00:30 @ max x g, °C, and discard flow-through
Add 500 µL RPE
Spin 00:00:30 @ max x g, °C, and discard flow-through
Add 500 µL EtOH abs
Spin 00:02:00 @ max x g, °C, and place column in new collection tube
Spin 00:02:00 @ max x g, °C, and place column in new 1.5 ml collection tube
Add 30 µL of RNase-free H 2 O
Incubate 00:01:00 @ Room temperature
Spin down 00:01:00 @ 8000 x g, °C,
QC: Qubit Qubit RNA BR Assay Kit Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #Q10211 and tape station RNA ScreenTape and Reagents Agilent Technologies
350 µL AW1 auf DNA Mini Spin Column geben
Spin 00:00:30 @ max x g, °C, and discard flow-through
80 µL Proteinase K working solution directly onto membrane
Incubate 00:05:00 @ Room temperature
Add 350 µL AW1
Spin 00:00:30 @ max x g, °C, and discard flow-through
Add 350 µL AW2
Spin 00:02:00 @ max x g, °C, and place column in new 2 ml collection tube
Spin 00:01:00 @ max x g, °C, and place column in new 1.5 ml collection tube
Add 50 µL EB buffer Qiagen Catalog #19086 directly onto membrane
Incubate 00:01:00 @ Room temperature
Spin down 00:01:00 @ 8000 x g, °C,
QC: Qubit DNA Qubit™ dsDNA BR Assay Kit Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #Q32853 and tape station Genomic DNA ScreenTape Agilent Technologies Catalog #5067-5365
Upload results from Tapestation here
Upload Tapestation results as pdf here.
From RNase-Free DNase Set Qiagen Catalog #79254 DNAse I working solution: 70 µL RDD + 10 µL DNase I working solution per sample
Optional: Weigh tissue before start to decide for volume
Enter a complete list of samples used for each experiment below: SampleID Type (TURB, T1, T2) Optional: Weight (mg) Comment DNA (ng/ul) 1 List of tissue sample used in experiment
Included within AllPrep DNA/RNA/miRNA Universal Kit (50) Qiagen Catalog #80224 Proteinase K working solution for DNA isolation: 60 µL AW1 + 20 µL Proteinase K per sample

Keep tubes with tissue on dry ice and make sure that they do not thaw during processing. Transfer the tissue piece into a 6-well plate or small petry dish placed on dry ice and cut an appropriate piece of tissue (ca. 10-30 mg) with a safety scalpel.
Included within AllPrep DNA/RNA/miRNA Universal Kit (50) Qiagen Catalog #80224 Add 10 µL ß-Mercaptoethanol (not included in kit) per 1 mL of RLT plus buffer
